# Version 4.151.0
> **First m151 preview** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 previews the m151 engine bump ahead of Chrome's stable cut.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — Aligns SkiaSharp with the current Chrome milestone so preview consumers get the latest upstream renderer ahead of stable. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **WebAssembly build unblocked** — Bumps the skia submodule to drop a duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define that was breaking the WebAssembly build. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Unblocked the WebAssembly build by removing a duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define upstream ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788)) |

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine bump and the WebAssembly build fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
